title: CareShield Life / ElderShield Supplements
text:
CareShield Life / ElderShield Supplements - SupportGoWhere
CareShield Life / ElderShield Supplements
Share link
Provides additional benefits, like higher payouts, for CareShield Life or ElderShield policyholders.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Supplement premiums can be paid using cash or MediSave for flexibility in payment
Can acquire multiple supplement policies to suit your needs
Grants extra coverage in addition to your existing CareShield Life or ElderShield plan
Collapse all sections
About this support

Complements your CareShield Life or ElderShield plan with enhanced coverage, providing extra benefits such as increased monthly payouts

Flexibility to buy multiple supplement policies for enhanced coverage

Premiums for Supplements can be paid thru cash or by using your or your family member’s MediSave, limited to $600 per calendar year per insured person

If you have existing Supplements under ElderShield and choose to join CareShield Life, you may continue to maintain your previous policy and can claim from both

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizen or Permanent Resident

Existing CareShield Life or ElderShield policyholder

How to apply?

Application for plans is done through the individual insurers

To review and compare Supplement plans, you may:

visit insurer websites or contact them directly for plan details.

read more about Supplements and see the comparison charts available online for CareShield Life and ElderShield supplements

Where can I find help?

View more details

Healthcare Hotline: 1800-222-3399

To avoid waiting on the line, you may book an appointment here.

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 19 May 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
